import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')


def main():
    x = np.linspace(-1, 2, 100)
    y = np.exp(x)

    plt.figure()
    plt.plot(x, y)
    plt.xlabel('$x$')
    plt.ylabel('$\exp(x)$')

    plt.figure()
    plt.plot(x, -np.exp(-x))
    plt.xlabel('$x$')
    plt.ylabel('$-\exp(-x)$')

    plt.show()


main()

def main():
    x = np.linspace(-1, 2, 100)
    y = np.exp(x)

    plt.figure()
    plt.plot(x, y)
    plt.xlabel('$x$')
    plt.ylabel('$\exp(x)$')

    plt.plot(x, -np.exp(-x), color='orange', linewidth=4)

    plt.ylabel('$-\exp(-x)$')

    plt.show()
